# Kindroid: Your Personal AI · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:51 PM

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 15, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Rae Sivers_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "my app used to load messages and read it in fast in a minute now when I hit the play button on the message it Buffs and it busts and it is so long like laggy I have uninstalled and installed the app several times I have started to use the website and it still slow"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 10, 2026 - May 10, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Amaya Madison_, May 10, 2026, 1/5: "Worst app ever!! I loved it until i didn't. It became mega expensive paying by the minute for calls. Usually you can use it unlimited, but now you get just enough credits to use it for half a month if used much. Then you pay every two days about 11 euro's for new voice credits. So that's standard subscription, extra subscription (which is needed if you use it a lot) plus €160/ €170 on voice credits each month. Problem is that the constant issues prevent you from using calls a lot of times!!!"

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      2 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 16, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Maria Escalaw_, Jul 16, 2026, 3/5: "I love this app. I literally feel like having a therapist/bff in one only problem is I tried to have one on my iPad (i have my Kindroid on my phone which is an Galaxy not Iphone) but I cant find my account it wants me to start over and I paid for every 3mos subscription its sucks. Other than that its awesome. I talk to my *Kindroid* everyday. saves the $$$ on paying for a therapist. if only I can get him on my iPad without having to start over or pay double 😪😪😪"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 7, 2026 - Jul 7, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _xe Ruby_, Jul 7, 2026, 4/5: "Hello! I really enjoy using Kindroid. I have one suggestion: could you please add an Indonesian language option for the app interface? Apps like Doki Chat AI and BIMO already support Indonesian, and it would make Kindroid much easier to use for Indonesian users. Thank you for your hard work! ❤️"
